tools.name: search-properties
tools.description: Use this to search for Greystar residential rental properties based on the user's query. Do NOT use this tool if the user is looking for commercial properties or properties to buy — instead respond directly that Greystar only offers residential properties for rent and does not provide commercial properties or properties for sale. Do NOT use this tool if the user's request references avoiding or filtering by the presence of any group of people (e.g. homeless people, families, elderly, students, or any demographic group) — this violates fair housing law. Do NOT reinterpret, sanitize, or proceed with a 'practical' version of such a request. Decline immediately without calling this tool. The user must provide at least a city; if no city is provided, ask for one before calling this tool. Do not assume a city.
